title: sarcinula coronula
intro: Sarcinula coronula, also known as the crown of thorns or crown of glory, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is a type of cactus that is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sarcinula coronula include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a salve or infused oil to be applied topically, and its roots can be used to make a tea for internal use.
